name: ai-marketing-engineering
description: AI-powered marketing engineering skill based on Alon Huri's framework. Transforms marketing from copywriting to engineering discipline through 10 agentic mechanisms: infinite creative generation, adaptive budget management, LTV signal hunting, contextual data layers, AEO optimization, dynamic quizzes, behavior-driven activation, personalized video at scale, competitor weakness targeting, and active churn prevention. Use when building marketing automation systems, designing growth engineering ...
